---
pagetitle: "About — Your Name"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== ABOUT HERO ========== -->
::: {.about-hero}
::: {.about-grid}

::: {.profile-photo-placeholder}
<i class="bi bi-person"></i>
:::

::: {.about-intro}

# Your Name

[Data Scientist & ML Engineer]{.subtitle}

::: {.bio}
I am a **data scientist** and **software engineer** with over 5 years of experience transforming complex data into actionable business insights. My work spans **machine learning**, **statistical modeling**, and **full-stack data applications**.

I hold a Master's degree in Computer Science from **[Your University]**, where I specialized in applied machine learning. Prior to my current role, I worked across the **finance**, **healthcare**, and **technology** sectors, building scalable data solutions that drive real-world impact.

When I'm not building models, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects, writing technical blog posts, or exploring the latest research in AI and NLP.
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== EXPERIENCE ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-narrow}

[Career]{.section-label}

## Professional Experience {.section-heading}

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[2022 — Present]{.period}

### Senior Data Scientist {.mb-0}
[Company Name · San Francisco, CA]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Lead a team of 4 data scientists building ML models for customer analytics. Designed and deployed a recommendation engine that increased user engagement by 25%. Partnered with product and engineering to integrate ML pipelines into production systems.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[2020 — 2022]{.period}

### Data Scientist {.mb-0}
[Company Name · New York, NY]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Developed predictive models for risk assessment and fraud detection in financial services. Built automated reporting dashboards using R Shiny and Tableau, reducing manual reporting time by 60%.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[2019 — 2020]{.period}

### Machine Learning Intern {.mb-0}
[Company Name · Boston, MA]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Implemented NLP pipelines for medical text classification. Contributed to research published in a top-tier ML conference. Collaborated with clinical teams to validate model outputs.
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== EDUCATION ========== -->
::: {.section}
::: {.section-narrow}

[Education]{.section-label}

## Academic Background {.section-heading}

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[2017 — 2019]{.period}

### M.S. Computer Science {.mb-0}
[Your University · City, State]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Thesis: "Scalable Approaches to Contextual Text Classification." Coursework in deep learning, statistical inference, distributed systems, and information retrieval. GPA: 3.9/4.0.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[2013 — 2017]{.period}

### B.S. Mathematics & Statistics {.mb-0}
[Your University · City, State]{.org}

::: {.desc}
Minor in Computer Science. Dean's List all semesters. Led the undergraduate data science club and organized campus-wide hackathons.
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== CERTIFICATIONS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-narrow}

[Credentials]{.section-label}

## Certifications & Awards {.section-heading}

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-award"></i>
:::

### AWS Certified ML — Specialty

Amazon Web Services · 2023

Demonstrated expertise in building, training, tuning, and deploying ML models on AWS.
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-trophy"></i>
:::

### Best Paper Award

International Conference on ML · 2022

Awarded for research on efficient fine-tuning methods for large language models.
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .purple}
<i class="bi bi-patch-check"></i>
:::

### Google Professional Data Engineer

Google Cloud · 2021

Certified in designing and building data processing systems on Google Cloud Platform.
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== PERSONAL ========== -->
::: {.section .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

## Beyond Work {.section-heading}

I believe great data science is driven by curiosity. Outside of work, I'm an avid reader of science fiction, a weekend trail runner, and a contributor to open-source ML tools. I also volunteer as a mentor for aspiring data scientists through community organizations.
{.section-desc style="margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:center;"}

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Resume](resume.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact Me](contact.qmd){.btn-outline-custom}
:::

:::
:::
